task_completion.description: Open Thunderbird Account Settings to Local Folders
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird 'Account Settings' tab or window is open, and 'Local Folders' is selected in the left-hand pane.

task_completion.description: Migrate mail files to the new directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or terminal output showing that Thunderbird mail files (e.g., 'Inbox', 'Trash', 'Unsent Messages') have been copied or moved into the target directory '/home/ga/ArchiveDrive/MailStore'.

task_completion.description: Configure the new Local Directory path in Thunderbird
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Thunderbird Account Settings for Local Folders, the 'Local Directory' text field explicitly displays the new path: '/home/ga/ArchiveDrive/MailStore'.

task_completion.description: Restart Thunderbird to apply directory changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box prompting to restart Thunderbird to apply the changed local directory is visible and being accepted, or there is evidence of Thunderbird being closed and reopened.

task_completion.description: Verify emails remain accessible in the new location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Thunderbird mail interface is visible with 'Local Folders' expanded, and a list of emails is successfully displayed in the message pane, proving the migration was successful and data is intact.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the actual Thunderbird application interface being used to change settings and view emails, rather than just terminal commands or text editors modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Emails are genuine and not manually mocked
integrity.visual_evidence: The emails visible in the Thunderbird message list should appear to be real, diverse emails (from the SpamAssassin corpus) rather than simple, manually typed dummy messages like 'test email'.

integrity.description: The directory path was actually changed in settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Local Directory' field in Thunderbird settings must explicitly show the new '/home/ga/ArchiveDrive/MailStore' path, ensuring the agent didn't just use a symlink while leaving the old path in the settings GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory for the Local Folders storage must be exactly '/home/ga/ArchiveDrive/MailStore'. Internally, Thunderbird maps 'Local Folders' to 'server1'. The email data being migrated is real data sourced from the SpamAssassin public corpus.
